subject: ENVS
course_description: Explores the role of business in "doing good" for society, how to develop a vision for sustainability within a company, what it means to work on environmental concerns in a major corporation, and compares the approaches of leading companies. Emphasis on readings, writing assignments and discussion.
course_notes: ENVS 120 or ENVS 130 or ENVS 131 or ENVS_OX 131 or ENVS 140 or ENVS 225 or ENVS 227/POLS 227 or ENVS 227W/POLS 227W or equivalent transfer credit as prerequisite.
requisites: ENVS 120 or ENVS 130 or ENVS 131 or ENVS_OX 131 or ENVS 140 or ENVS 225 or ENVS 227/POLS 227 or ENVS 227W/POLS 227W or equivalent transfer credit as prerequisite.
